raw_consumer_statement:
XXXXWe are going on an Alaska cruise. We found out a month before going on the cruise that if you had a XXXX, XXXX  may not let you in to the country. Very upset with this information. as my son and Daughter in law had a XXXX  23 years ago.
My daughter in law XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX customer service to see if anything could be done.
She spoke with a XXXX, he said they were XXXX XXXX XXXX line customer service.
He said that since we had insurance that he could charge us another XXXX  on my credit card, ( as now they have gotten me on the phone) and then once the insurance kicked in then i would get a refund.
He said if XXXX  did not allow them into the country that they could just go to the next port which is Alaska and get on.
I told them to charge my account but only if i would be getting a refund.
He said yes.
After a few weeks, i noticed no refund so i called the phone numbers we had.\XXXX  answered the one phone number, i asked if this was XXXX XXXX and she said yes,
I asked for XXXX, she said he was on leave.
I explained the situation to her. she put me on hold a few times, asked for more information and then finnally came back and said she had no transaction of that.
I explained i needed a refund and she said she couldn't.
I said i would call the credit card company and get the charge stopped.
she then proceeded to try and tell me I still owed more money. I started yelling saying i spent enough, and she hung up.
I called American Express and told them i needed to dispute the charge for $XXXX  as i believe now it was a scam. They told me that since i approved it, there is nothing that they can do.
I called on XXXX
I spoke with the police and filed a report.
report number XXXX, with the Lesueur county police in XXXX  county, MN.
They gave me serveral website to contact and XXXX  phone number.\XXXX  told me that if i didn't get what i paid for the credit card should reinburse me.
which i should have gotten a refund.
The information that i  have is 
phone numbers we were given\XXXX  XXXX
now when you call it goes to voice mail
XXXX is now a busy signal\XXXX XXXX they answer but now it is for a different business.
on my credit card statement on XXXX is for XXXX is to XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX agency XXXX XXXX  IA.\XXXX that phone number is out of order,
I did not receive any goods or services for the XXXX. American express paid the people , why can't they reverse the charges?
Please Advise

Thank you for your time"
